is_audience_on_ph.q: Is your ICP active on Product Hunt (indie makers, early-stage founders, prosumer/dev/design tools)?

have_warm_supporter_pool.q: Can you personally reach 100+ engaged supporters (list, X, LinkedIn, Discord, customers)?

have_tagline_under_60_chars.q: Do you have a tagline that's under 60 chars and names the outcome, not the technology?

have_gallery_with_real_product.q: Do you have 4+ gallery slides with real product UI (not mockups or illustrations)?

have_hunter_strategy.q: Have you decided whether to self-hunt or partner with a known hunter?
